roots: street 街道 + lamp 燈
ex1En: The street lamp is very bright at night.
ex1Zh: 路燈在晚上很亮。
ex2En: A street lamp stands in front of my house.
ex2Zh: 我家前面有一盞路燈。

roots: cross 穿越 + walk 走路
ex1En: Please use the crosswalk to cross the road.
ex1Zh: 請使用斑馬線過馬路。
ex2En: The children waited at the crosswalk.
ex2Zh: 孩子們在斑馬線旁等待。

roots: ped 腳、走路 + -ian 表示人
ex1En: The driver stopped for the pedestrian.
ex1Zh: 司機停下來讓行人先過。
ex2En: Pedestrians should walk on the sidewalk.
ex2Zh: 行人應該走在人行道上。

roots: parking 停車 + space 空間
ex1En: I found a parking space near the store.
ex1Zh: 我在商店附近找到一個停車位。
ex2En: There is no parking space here.
ex2Zh: 這裡沒有停車位。

roots: shopping 購物 + channel 頻道
ex1En: My mom likes watching the shopping channel.
ex1Zh: 我媽媽喜歡看購物頻道。
ex2En: The shopping channel sells many kitchen tools.
ex2Zh: 購物頻道販售很多廚房用品。

roots: variety 多樣化 + show 節目
ex1En: This variety show is funny.
ex1Zh: 這個綜藝節目很好笑。
ex2En: We watched a variety show after dinner.
ex2Zh: 我們晚餐後看了一個綜藝節目。

roots: 無
ex1En: She watches a Korean drama every night.
ex1Zh: 她每天晚上看一部韓劇。
ex2En: This drama has a sad ending.
ex2Zh: 這部電視劇有一個悲傷的結局。

roots: reality 現實 + show 節目
ex1En: This reality show is very popular.
ex1Zh: 這個真人秀很受歡迎。
ex2En: My sister enjoys watching reality shows.
ex2Zh: 我妹妹喜歡看真人秀。

roots: toast 烤麵包 + -er 表示機器或人
ex1En: I put two slices of bread in the toaster.
ex1Zh: 我把兩片麵包放進烤麵包機。
ex2En: The toaster is on the kitchen table.
ex2Zh: 烤麵包機在廚房桌上。

roots: 無
ex1En: I used an iron to make my shirt smooth.
ex1Zh: 我用熨斗把襯衫燙平。
ex2En: Be careful because the iron is hot.
ex2Zh: 小心，因為熨斗很燙。

roots: blend 混合 + -er 表示機器
ex1En: She made juice with a blender.
ex1Zh: 她用果汁機做果汁。
ex2En: Put the fruit into the blender.
ex2Zh: 把水果放進果汁機裡。

roots: dish 碗盤 + washer 清洗機
ex1En: We put the dirty plates in the dishwasher.
ex1Zh: 我們把髒盤子放進洗碗機。
ex2En: The dishwasher saves us a lot of time.
ex2Zh: 洗碗機幫我們省下很多時間。

roots: hair 頭髮 + dryer 乾燥機
ex1En: I use a hair dryer after washing my hair.
ex1Zh: 我洗完頭後使用吹風機。
ex2En: Her hair dryer is very small.
ex2Zh: 她的吹風機很小。

roots: vacuum 真空 + cleaner 清潔器
ex1En: He cleaned the floor with a vacuum cleaner.
ex1Zh: 他用吸塵器清理地板。
ex2En: The vacuum cleaner is too loud.
ex2Zh: 這台吸塵器太吵了。

roots: mani 手 + cure 照顧
ex1En: She got a manicure before the party.
ex1Zh: 她在派對前做了美甲。
ex2En: My sister wants a pink manicure.
ex2Zh: 我妹妹想做粉紅色的美甲。

roots: co- 一起 + incidence 發生的事
ex1En: It was a coincidence that we wore the same shirt.
ex1Zh: 我們穿同樣的衣服是個巧合。
ex2En: What a coincidence! We met again.
ex2Zh: 真巧！我們又見面了。

roots: pro- 向前 + pose 放置
ex1En: He wanted to propose to his girlfriend.
ex1Zh: 他想向他的女朋友求婚。
ex2En: She proposed a new idea in class.
ex2Zh: 她在課堂上提出了一個新想法。

roots: millennium 千年 + -als 表示一群人
ex1En: Millennials use the Internet a lot.
ex1Zh: 千禧世代很常使用網路。
ex2En: Many Millennials like online shopping.
ex2Zh: 許多千禧世代喜歡網路購物。

roots: retire 退休 + -ment 名詞字尾
ex1En: My grandfather enjoys his retirement.
ex1Zh: 我的爺爺享受他的退休生活。
ex2En: She saved money for retirement.
ex2Zh: 她為退休存錢。

meaning: 爆紅的；病毒式傳播的；病毒的
roots: virus 病毒 + -al 形容詞字尾
ex1En: The video went viral online.
ex1Zh: 這支影片在網路上爆紅。
ex2En: His funny post became viral.
ex2Zh: 他的有趣貼文爆紅了。

roots: pass 經過 + out 出去
ex1En: She passed out because it was too hot.
ex1Zh: 她因為天氣太熱而昏倒了。
ex2En: He almost passed out after running.
ex2Zh: 他跑步後差點昏倒。

roots: snorkel 浮潛呼吸管 + -ing 活動
ex1En: We went snorkeling in the sea.
ex1Zh: 我們去海裡浮潛。
ex2En: Snorkeling is fun in clear water.
ex2Zh: 在清澈的水中浮潛很好玩。

roots: entertain 娛樂 + -ment 名詞字尾
ex1En: Movies are a popular form of entertainment.
ex1Zh: 電影是一種受歡迎的娛樂形式。
ex2En: Music is my favorite entertainment.
ex2Zh: 音樂是我最喜歡的娛樂。

roots: self 自己 + -ie 非正式名詞字尾
ex1En: She took a selfie with her friends.
ex1Zh: 她和朋友們自拍。
ex2En: He posted a selfie on Instagram.
ex2Zh: 他在 Instagram 上發布了一張自拍。

meaning: 低頭族；一直看手機而忽略別人的人
roots: phone 手機 + snubber 冷落別人的人
ex1En: A phubber often looks at the phone during dinner.
ex1Zh: 低頭族常常在吃飯時看手機。
ex2En: Do not be a phubber when you talk to others.
ex2Zh: 和別人說話時不要當低頭族。

roots: re- 再一次 + purpose 目的 + -ing 活動
ex1En: Repurposing old bottles can reduce waste.
ex1Zh: 重新利用舊瓶子可以減少浪費。
ex2En: Repurposing old clothes is a good idea.
ex2Zh: 重新利用舊衣服是一個好主意。

roots: 無
ex1En: She made tremendous progress in English.
ex1Zh: 她在英文上有巨大的進步。
ex2En: The team did a tremendous job.
ex2Zh: 這個團隊做得非常出色。

roots: stain 污漬；染色 + -ed 形容詞字尾
ex1En: His shirt was stained with coffee.
ex1Zh: 他的襯衫被咖啡弄髒了。
ex2En: The tablecloth was stained after dinner.
ex2Zh: 晚餐後桌布有污漬。
